event_form.title: Event Form
event_form.subtitle: Tell us about your event
event_form.notes_placeholder: Tell us more about what you have in mind...
event_form.products_description: Select the products you are interested in and indicate the quantity.
event_form.footer_note: Your information will be sent securely to the organizer.

expired.title: Link unavailable
expired.description: This link has already been used or has expired. Contact the organizer to request a new one.
expired.security_note: Form links are single-use and have an expiration date to protect your security.

not_found.title: Invalid link
not_found.description: We couldn't find this link. Check the link or ask the organizer to share it with you again.

admin_links.title: Forms
admin_links.subtitle: Generate links for your clients to fill in their event details
admin_links.no_links_desc: Generate a shareable link for your potential clients to fill in their event details and select products.
admin_links.label_placeholder: e.g. Wedding of Maria and Pedro
admin_links.confirm_revoke: Revoke this link? It can no longer be used.

errors.submit_failed: There was an error sending. Try again.
errors.connection_error: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.

portal.hero_greeting: Hi {{name}}, here are your event details:
portal.hero_greeting_no_name: Hi, here are your event details:

upgrade.title: Limited access
upgrade.description: The organizer has a free plan. To access all event details (schedules, location, number of guests), the organizer needs to upgrade their plan.
upgrade.details_locked: This portal keeps payments and receipts available, but some operational event details are unlocked with the organizer's Pro plan.

payments.title: Payment status
payments.footer_note: Payments are updated when the organizer registers them. If you have any questions, contact them directly.
payments.pro_only: Payments from this portal are available only for organizers on Pro plans.
payments.pro_only_hint: If you do not see options to send or review receipts, ask the organizer to upgrade their plan.
payments.summary_intro: Here you can check your event status and register payment receipts.
payments.submit_intro: Fill in your transfer details. The organizer will review and confirm it.
payments.submit_success: Receipt sent. The organizer will review it soon.
payments.history_empty: You have not sent any receipts yet.
payments.amount_required: Amount must be a positive number.
payments.submit_error: Could not send receipt. Please try again.

portal.footer_note: Private client portal · powered by Solennix

unavailable.not_found_desc: We could not find any information with this link. Check the link or ask the organizer to resend it.
unavailable.disabled_desc: The event organizer disabled this link or it has expired. Contact them to get a new one.
unavailable.security_note: Client portal links are private per event — the organizer can rotate them at any time for security.

success.title: Request sent!
success.description: Thank you for contacting us. We have received your information and will get in touch with you soon.
success.organizer_note: A team from {{name}} will review your request.

hero.subtitle: One platform to run your full event cycle: professional quotes, online payments, inventory, staff, and a client portal. All in one place.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.desc: Stop juggling spreadsheets, chat threads, and scattered notes. Centralize your operation in a platform built for event professionals.

quotes.title: Professional Quotes
quotes.desc: Generate PDF quotes in minutes. Your client receives a link, can accept, and pay from their phone.

payments.title: Collections and Payments
payments.desc: Stripe integrated. Charge in installments, let clients pay online, and reconcile payments automatically.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.desc: Your clients access their contract, photos, timeline, and can pay without leaving the app.

inventory.title: Inventory and Resources
inventory.desc: Register equipment and staff. The system prevents availability conflicts automatically.

staff.title: Staff and Teams
staff.desc: Assign team members, send assignments, and collect confirmations in one place.

calendar.title: Integrated Calendar
calendar.desc: All events, availability, and conflicts in one view. Drag and reorder as needed.

reports.title: Real-Time Reports
reports.desc: Revenue, events, and utilization. Real metrics to optimize pricing and grow.

forms.title: Public Forms
forms.desc: Create request and quote forms. Let clients request quotes on their own.

how.title: Start in minutes, not days
how.desc: We designed the platform to feel intuitive and powerful from second one.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.desc: Sign up for free. No credit card required.

step2.title: Quote in minutes
step2.desc: Create a professional quote. Your client receives it by link.

step3.title: Collect online
step3.desc: Your client accepts and pays from their phone. Stripe handles reconciliation.

step4.title: Execute with confidence
step4.desc: Inventory, staff, and client portal. Everything under control.

app.title: Your business in your pocket
app.desc: Manage events, review payments, and confirm inventory from your iPhone. The same power as the web platform, now wherever you are.

features.auth: Face ID and Touch ID for instant access

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.desc: More than 500 organizers already trust Solennix to run their business.

maria.name: María González
maria.text: The client portal changed everything. Couples review contracts, upload photos, and pay online. I no longer chase payments.

carlos.name: Carlos Mendoza
carlos.text: Inventory control saved our operation. No more double bookings and the team receives assignments on mobile.

ana.name: Ana Rodríguez
ana.text: Automated quotes and payment links save me 10 hours a week. Clients pay before the event.

pricing.title: Plans for every stage
pricing.desc: Start free and activate Pro when you need it.

items.question: Do I need a credit card to sign up?
items.answer: No. The Basic plan is fully free and does not require a credit card. You only need an email address.

items.question: Can I import my existing data?
items.answer: Yes. You can import clients from CSV or Excel. We also offer assisted migration for Pro accounts.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption, automatic daily backups, and SOC 2 certified infrastructure.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes, with no penalties or lock-in contracts. You can cancel at any time and keep access until the end of your paid period.

cta.title: Ready to scale
cta.subtitle: Join the next generation of organizers already running a professional operation.

footer.desc: The all-in-one platform for professional event organizers in Mexico and LATAM.
